data.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia Discuss Security Measures After Iranian Strikes
data.description: Pakistan's army chief recently held discussions with Saudi Arabia's defense minister to address joint security measures in response to Iranian drone and missile attacks on Gulf states. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of these talks amid rising regional tensions. The meeting underscores the ongoing collaboration between Pakistan and Saudi Arabia in maintaining stability and security in the Gulf region.

data.title: Trump Threatens Severe Action Against Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a stern warning to Iran, stating that the country could face significant repercussions today. CNN Breaking News posted on X, highlighting Trump's remarks about potential severe measures, including the possibility of 'complete destruction and certain death' in specific areas of Iran. This statement comes amid escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, raising concerns about the potential for military conflict. The international community is closely monitoring the situation, as the implications of such actions could have far-reaching consequences for regional stability and global relations.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 68,000 USDT with a 2.73% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2026, 12:09 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,989 USDT, with a narrowed 2.73% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Iran launches six missiles at Israel within 12 hours
data.description: According to the latest reports from Jerusalem, Iran launched six rounds of missiles at Israel between midnight and noon local time today. Local health authorities stated that there are no reports of casualties so far. Separately, the Israeli military announced that it launched a series of airstrikes against Tehran and central Iran from the night of the 6th to the early morning of the 7th, deploying more than 80 fighter jets and dropping 230 bombs. (CCTV International News)

data.title: UAE Defense Ministry Reports Successful Interception of Iranian Missiles and Drones
data.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) Defense Ministry announced that its air defense systems successfully intercepted ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and drone attacks from Iran. According to Jin10, the UAE's defense capabilities were put to the test as they managed to thwart these threats effectively. The interception highlights the ongoing tensions in the region and the UAE's preparedness to counter potential threats. The ministry emphasized the importance of maintaining robust defense measures to ensure national security amid regional instability.

source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-dominates-spot-trading-with-nearly-40-market-share/

data.title: Coruna: iOS malware that empties crypto wallets
data.description:
Google discovers Coruna, a hacking toolkit that infects iPhones without a click and steals the seed phrases of 18 crypto apps including MetaMask, Exodus and Trust Wallet. All it took was iOS 17. 2. 1 to be vulnerable.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/hack/coruna-ios-malware-that-empties-crypto-wallets/

data.title: Beijing Leads in Securing African Minerals
data.description: Beijing is significantly ahead of Washington in securing mineral resources from Africa. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic moves by China to strengthen its position in the mineral-rich continent. This development underscores the growing competition between the two global powers in accessing critical resources essential for technological advancements and economic growth. China's proactive approach in Africa contrasts with the United States' efforts to establish larger trade agreements. The focus on minerals is crucial as they are vital components in various industries, including electronics and renewable energy. The ongoing rivalry between the U.S. and China in Africa reflects broader geopolitical dynamics, with both nations seeking to expand their influence and secure essential resources for future technological and economic needs.

data.title: Qatar and Egypt Urge De-escalation in Regional Tensions
data.description: Qatar's Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammed held a phone conversation with Egypt's Foreign Minister Sameh Shoukry to discuss the current regional situation. According to Jin10, Mohammed emphasized the need for all parties to immediately cease any escalation activities and return to the negotiation table. He called for rational and wise actions to contain the crisis and maintain regional security and stability. Shoukry also urged all involved parties to exercise restraint, work towards de-escalation, and resolve differences through negotiation and diplomatic means to prevent further deterioration of the situation.

data.title: India Considers Russian LNG Purchase Amid Rising Fuel Stockpiles
data.description: India's fuel reserves are reportedly increasing daily, according to Jin10. In light of this, the Indian government is contemplating the purchase of Russian liquefied natural gas (LNG) if the supply becomes available. This move comes as part of India's broader strategy to secure energy resources and manage its growing energy demands. The potential acquisition of Russian LNG would mark a significant step in India's efforts to diversify its energy sources and ensure stable fuel supplies.

data.title: India Maintains Current Fuel Prices Amid Economic Concerns
data.description: India has decided not to increase retail prices for petrol and diesel at this time, according to Jin10. Government sources indicate that the decision is influenced by ongoing economic considerations and the potential impact on consumers. The move comes as the country navigates various economic challenges, including inflation and global market fluctuations. Maintaining stable fuel prices is seen as a measure to support economic stability and consumer confidence. The government continues to monitor the situation closely, ensuring that any future adjustments align with broader economic goals.

data.title: India's Oil Procurement Strategy: Tanker Cargo Booked from Yanbu Port
data.description: India has taken strategic steps in its oil procurement by booking tanker cargo from Yanbu Port, according to Jin10. This move is part of India's broader efforts to secure energy resources amid fluctuating global oil prices and geopolitical tensions. The decision reflects India's proactive approach to ensuring a stable supply of oil, which is crucial for its economic growth and energy security. As global markets continue to experience volatility, India's actions highlight the importance of diversifying supply sources and maintaining robust energy strategies.

data.title: Trump: Iran will suffer a heavy blow today
data.description: Trump: Iran, suffering an unprecedented blow, has apologized and surrendered to its Middle Eastern neighbors, promising not to fire on them again. This promise was made entirely because of the relentless attacks by the United States and Israel. Iran had attempted to take over and dominate the Middle East. This is the first time in thousands of years that Iran has lost a contest with its neighboring Middle Eastern countries. They say, "Thank you, President Trump." I say, "You're welcome!" Iran is no longer the "Middle Eastern bully," but has become the "Middle Eastern loser," and will remain so for decades until they surrender, or more likely, completely collapse! Today, Iran will suffer a devastating blow! Due to Iran's egregious actions, regions and populations previously not considered for attack are now under serious consideration for potential and certain destruction. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Strait of Hormuz Sees Limited Transit Activity for Sixth Consecutive Day
data.description: The Strait of Hormuz has experienced minimal transit activity for the sixth consecutive day, with only Iran-linked tankers making the crossing in the past 24 hours. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing situation in this critical maritime passage. The slowdown in vessel movement through the strait, a vital route for global oil shipments, continues to raise concerns about potential disruptions in the energy supply chain. The current situation underscores the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz in international trade and energy markets.

data.title: Iran's President Vows Resilience Amid Ongoing Conflict with US and Israel
data.description: Iran's president has declared a firm stance against surrender as Tehran continues its missile strikes on Gulf states in the ongoing conflict with the United States and Israel. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the persistence of hostilities that have now extended into a week-long confrontation. The situation remains tense as both sides engage in military actions, with no immediate resolution in sight.
